relevance_spans.text: Hello, my name is Gary Templeton. In this video, I'll be exploring a significant study that unites the concepts of organizational learning and control.
We argue that organizations need a deeper understanding of how knowledge functions within control systems to improve knowledge management.

rights_note: YouTube source content remains owned by its rightsholder. Transcript is retained for research, indexing, quotation, and verification; no ownership is claimed.
title: Organizational Learning Based on Control
